title: TEAS WorkOrder (task_graph row)
description: Canonical HEALED profile of the unit-of-work aggregate for the LifeOS Task Execution Automation System. Superset of handoff.task.v1 (origin), rusty-idd work-order (mirror), the execution-framework 40-column task_graph.csv, and planning-spine-v0 task.schema.json. Heals DOMAIN_MODEL contradiction 9.1: both CSV projections derive from this schema; Rust types are schemars-generated from it. The current handoff WorkOrder struct is the origin and CONVERGES to this superset (it does not yet emit every field — see DOMAIN_MODEL 9.6); 'const handoff.task.v1' denotes the healed profile, not the present struct shape. One task schema, workspace-wide.

schema.description: Schema tag; pins the shared kernel version.

id.description: Stable identity, e.g. HFTASK-0058, PHTASK-0025, TASK-0001, KBTASK-FLEET-ROLLOUT.

correlation_id.description: Cross-system handle (= upstream SwarmBundle.workflow_id / OpenSpec change id).

status.description: Card-declared status. Authoritative status is derived from the ledger by replay; on conflict the ledger wins.

model_tag.description: Routing hint for tier selection (e.g. haiku/sonnet/opus/agent-booster).

path_scope.description: Paths this WorkOrder may touch. Hashed into IntentLock.path_scope_hash.

execution_cell.description: Hermetic cell type; network denied by default, read-only FS except writable_paths.

human_approval_required.description: MUST be true for spend, legal, external real-world action, production mutation, account creation, credential handling, trading, physical home automation, or anything irreversible.

proof_required.description: No proof, no Done. When present must be true; defaults true. Optional at the schema layer because the origin handoff struct does not yet emit it (DOMAIN_MODEL 9.6); the 'no Done without proof' invariant is enforced at the ledger/gate layer regardless.

proof_uri.description: Location of the ProofRecord once produced.

rollback_plan.description: Exact steps to reverse this WorkOrder. Canonically REQUIRED and enforced at the gate/adapter layer; optional at the schema layer until the origin handoff struct grows it (DOMAIN_MODEL 9.6).

intent_lock.description: Value object: blake3 hashes pinning the immutable contract surface. A verifier recomputes these; any mismatch is drift and the WorkOrder is refused. Legacy 3-hash locks round-trip (no-downgrade).
